allow: Bash(f="/d/WorkPath/VSCode/Simulators/BotEnergy/app/index.html"; echo "=== NAV / TAB / SCREEN markup ==="; grep -nEi "nav|tab|screen|data-view|menu|<button" "$f" | head -40; echo; echo "=== token/permission/subtype/user parsing ==="; grep -nEi "permission|SubType|UserGroup|Corporate|Organization|parseJwt|atob|decode|state.user|\\.user" "$f" | head -40)
